summary: Phase 2 Features VERIFIED: Enhanced Ad Spy with save/bookmark, detail modal, category filter (25 categories), and Competitor Intelligence Dashboard with store analysis, pricing strategy, supplier risk scoring, category breakdown, top products, and compare functionality. All backend APIs pass 19/19 tests. All frontend components render and function correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/ads/discover returns categories array (25 categories)
BACKEND: POST /api/ads/save requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/ads/save saves an ad with ad_id and ad_data
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/saved requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/ads/saved returns saved ads for user
BACKEND: DELETE /api/ads/saved/{id} removes a saved ad
BACKEND: Full save/unsave flow works correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/competitor-intel/analyze requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/competitor-intel/analyze returns store analysis (allbirds.com)
BACKEND: Pricing fields verified (min, max, avg, median, strategy, consistency)
BACKEND: Supplier risk scoring (vendor_count, top_vendors, risk_level, risk_reason)
BACKEND: Invalid store URL returns appropriate error
BACKEND: POST /api/competitor-intel/compare requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/competitor-intel/compare returns comparison data for 2+ stores
BACKEND: Compare endpoint requires at least 2 URLs
BACKEND: GET /api/competitor-intel/history requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/competitor-intel/history returns previously analyzed stores
BACKEND: Full Ad Spy integration flow (discover, save, verify, unsave)
BACKEND: Full Competitor Intel integration flow (analyze, history)
FRONTEND: Ad Spy page loads at /ad-spy with data-testid='ad-spy-page'
FRONTEND: '24 ads found' badge displayed
FRONTEND: Platform filter buttons (All Platforms, TikTok, Meta/Facebook, Pinterest)
FRONTEND: Category filter dropdown with 25 category options
FRONTEND: Ad cards displayed (24 cards)
FRONTEND: Ad detail modal opens on card click
FRONTEND: Modal save button present (data-testid='modal-save-btn')
FRONTEND: Modal close button works (data-testid='close-ad-modal')
FRONTEND: Save/bookmark button on ad cards works
FRONTEND: Competitor Intel page loads at /competitor-intel
FRONTEND: Store analyzer form present (data-testid='store-analyzer-form')
FRONTEND: Store URL input present (data-testid='store-url-input')
FRONTEND: Analyze Store button present (data-testid='analyze-store-btn')
FRONTEND: Compare toggle present (data-testid='toggle-compare')
FRONTEND: Store analysis results displayed after analyzing allbirds.com
FRONTEND: Store header shows domain, tier (Enterprise), ~50 months old, 250 products
FRONTEND: Stats row shows Est. Monthly Revenue ($574,462), Avg Price ($95.74), Categories (5), Vendors (1)
FRONTEND: Pricing Strategy card shows Premium strategy, Moderate spread, $95 median
FRONTEND: Supplier Risk card shows High risk with single vendor dependency warning
FRONTEND: Category Breakdown with progress bars (Shoes 86%, Apparel 8%, etc.)
FRONTEND: Top Products section with product images and prices
FRONTEND: Compare two stores toggle shows second URL input and Compare button
FRONTEND: Sidebar has 'Competitor Intel' navigation link at /competitor-intel

verified_features.verification: Save button on ad cards toggles bookmark state. Backend POST /api/ads/save, GET /api/ads/saved, DELETE /api/ads/saved/{id} all work
Clicking ad card opens detail modal with metrics (likes, comments, shares, views), platform info, launch score, est. spend, trend stage. Modal has save button and close button
Category filter dropdown present with 25 options from GET /api/ads/discover response

POST /api/competitor-intel/analyze returns product_count, categories, pricing (strategy, min/max/avg/median/consistency), revenue_estimate (monthly_revenue, daily_orders), suppliers (vendor_count, risk_level, risk_reason, top_vendors), store_tier, top_products
Compare toggle shows second URL input. POST /api/competitor-intel/compare with urls array returns comparison table data
'Recent analyses (1)' toggle shows previously analyzed stores. GET /api/competitor-intel/history returns user's analysis history
'Competitor Intel' nav link present in sidebar, navigates to /competitor-intel

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from products collection and external Shopify API (allbirds.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully verified: (1) Enhanced Ad Spy at /ad-spy with save/bookmark functionality, detail modal with rich metrics, and category filter dropdown (25 categories). Backend endpoints: POST /api/ads/save, GET /api/ads/saved, DELETE /api/ads/saved/{id}. (2) Competitor Intelligence Dashboard at /competitor-intel with deep store analysis. Test with Shopify stores like allbirds.com or colourpop.com. Backend endpoints: POST /api/competitor-intel/analyze, POST /api/competitor-intel/compare, GET /api/competitor-intel/history. All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Onboarding dialog may intercept clicks - dismiss with 'Skip walkthrough' or Escape key.
